mapper.select: select ji.id as job_instance_id, ji.tenant_id as tenant_id, ji.operator_id as operator_id, ji.job_code as job_code, ji.instance_status as instance_status, ji.finished_at as finished_at from batch.job_instance ji where ji.instance_status in ('SUCCESS', 'FAILED', 'CANCELLED', 'TERMINATED', 'PARTIAL_FAILED') and ji.finished_at is not null and ji.finished_at >= now() - (#{lookbackMinutes}::text || ' minutes')::interval and ji.operator_id is not null and not exists ( select 1 from batch.console_push_job_notification n where n.tenant_id = ji.tenant_id and n.job_instance_id = ji.id ) order by ji.finished_at asc limit #{batchSize}
mapper.insert: insert into batch.console_push_job_notification (tenant_id, job_instance_id) values (#{tenantId}, #{jobInstanceId}) on conflict (tenant_id, job_instance_id) do nothing
